title: [codex] fix finance gcp headless billing auth
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Counting the pollen
gist.blurb: Fixed a sneaky authentication bug that was keeping our internal GCP billing scripts from reading the latest data. The hive's accounting is back on track!
gist.summary: Resolved an authentication issue in the internal finance scripts where headless GCP billing exports were failing to read data.
gist.impact: Internal billing and cash flow metrics for GCP will now update correctly during automated runs.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as an accountant, fixing a machine that counts coins or data. A retro terminal showing charts or coins, representing the GCP billing export fix.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny green accountant's visor, inspecting a glowing retro terminal that displays a rising bar chart and pixelated gold coins. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny green accountant's visor, inspecting a glowing retro terminal that displays a rising bar chart and pixelated gold coins.
